features.featureTitle: Apply a sleek, luxurious visual theme throughout the site: dark background (near-black #0A0A0A / #111111), gold/amber accent color (#D4AF37 / #F5C842), off-white text, and a premium sans-serif typeface (e.g., Inter or Montserrat). All sections must use consistent spacing, smooth scroll behavior, and subtle entrance animations (fade-in/slide-up on scroll). The design must be fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints.

Build a full-screen Hero section at the top of the page featuring: the business name 'Elite Car Care' in large, bold typography; the tagline 'Premium Auto Detailing & Car Care Services'; a prominent CTA button labeled 'Book Now' that smooth-scrolls to the Contact/Booking section; and a full-width background using the generated hero image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.jpg) with a dark overlay for legibility.

Build a Services section listing the following six services in a responsive card grid: Full Detail (Interior + Exterior), Exterior Wash & Wax, Interior Deep Clean, Paint Correction & Protection, Ceramic Coating, Engine Bay Cleaning. Each card should display a relevant icon, the service name, and a short description. Cards should have a hover effect (gold border highlight or subtle lift).

Build a 'Why Choose Us' section highlighting four key differentiators in a visually distinct layout (e.g., icon + heading + description blocks): Experienced Professionals, Premium Products, Satisfaction Guaranteed, Mobile Service Available. Use gold icons and a dark card or alternating layout.

Build a Gallery / Before & After section displaying a grid of car detailing images using the generated gallery images (gallery-1.dim_800x600.jpg through gallery-6.dim_800x600.jpg). The section heading should read 'Our Work'. Images should display in a responsive masonry or uniform grid with a hover overlay effect showing a gold tint or zoom effect.

Build a Pricing section with three service tier cards: Basic, Standard, and Premium. Each card should list the tier name, price, and a bullet list of included services. The recommended tier (Standard) should be visually emphasized with a gold border or badge. Each card includes a 'Book Now' CTA button that scrolls to the contact form.

Build a Testimonials section displaying at least four customer reviews. Each testimonial card should show a star rating (5 stars in gold), a review quote, and the customer's name. Use a horizontally scrollable carousel or a 2×2 grid layout on desktop.

Build a Contact / Booking section with a styled form containing the following fields: Full Name (text), Email Address (email), Phone Number (tel), Service Selection (dropdown with the 6 service options), Preferred Date (date picker), and a Message/Notes textarea. Include a submit button labeled 'Request a Quote'. On submit, display a success confirmation message. Store submitted bookings in the backend.

Build a Footer section containing: the Elite Car Care logo/name with a short tagline, navigation links to each page section, social media icon links (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X), hours of operation (Mon–Fri 8am–6pm, Sat 9am–5pm, Sun Closed), and a business address. Style with a very dark background and gold accents.

Implement a sticky navigation bar at the top of the page that includes the 'Elite Car Care' logo/name and anchor links to all major sections (Home, Services, Why Us, Gallery, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact). The navbar should have a transparent background on the hero and transition to a solid dark background on scroll. Include a mobile hamburger menu.
